member.name: T:EntityIdHelper
member.summary: Utility class used internally by the sdk.

member.name: F:EntityIdHelper.SOLIDITY_ADDRESS_LEN
member.summary: The length of a Solidity address in bytes.

member.name: F:EntityIdHelper.SOLIDITY_ADDRESS_LEN_HEX
member.summary: The length of a hexadecimal-encoded Solidity address, in ASCII characters (bytes).

member.name: M:EntityIdHelper.FromString``1(System.String,WithIdNums{``0})
member.summary: <summary> Generate an R object from a string. </summary> <param name="idString">the id string</param> <param name="constructObjectWithIdNums">the R object generator</param> <param name="<R>"></param> <returns>the R type object</returns>

member.name: M:EntityIdHelper.FromSolidityAddress``1(System.String,WithIdNums{``0})
member.summary: <summary> Generate an R object from a solidity address. </summary> <param name="address">the string representation</param> <param name="withAddress">the R object generator</param> <param name="<R>"></param> <returns>the R type object</returns>

member.name: M:EntityIdHelper.DecodeEvmAddress(System.String)
member.summary: Decode the solidity address from a string.

member.name: M:EntityIdHelper.IsLongZeroAddress(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Takes an address as `byte[]` and returns whether this is a long-zero address

member.name: M:EntityIdHelper.ToStringWithChecksum(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,Client,System.String)
member.summary: Generate a string representation with a checksum.

member.name: M:EntityIdHelper.GetEvmAddressFromMirrorNodeAsync(Client,System.Int64)
member.summary: Get EvmAddress from mirror node using account num.

member.name: M:EntityIdHelper.GetAccountNumFromMirrorNodeAsync(Client,System.String)
member.summary: Get AccountId num from mirror node using evm address.

member.name: M:EntityIdHelper.GetContractNumFromMirrorNodeAsync(Client,System.String)
member.summary: Get ContractId num from mirror node using evm address.
